CustomField.label: Value
CustomField.description: Serialized per the contract: scalar values stored as stringified API values; multi-value operators (IN/NOT IN/INCLUDES/EXCLUDES) store JSON array of API values; date literals stored as canonical tokens (TODAY, LAST_N_DAYS:N); booleans as "true"/"false"; numbers as plain string numerics; picklists always store API names (never labels).
